channel.title: 文献追踪系统
channel.description: 自动追踪 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉领域最新文献

item.title: invDFT：用于从基态密度反推精确交换关联势的CPU-GPU大规模并行工具
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
本文介绍invDFT，一个面向CPU-GPU混合架构的大规模并行计算工具，用于从给定的基态电子密度反向求解精确的交换关联势。该工具可为密度泛函理论的发展与基准提供高精度参考，详情见原文。

item.title: 更高自旋流伴随更低耗散
item.description:
📚 Nature Physics
👤 Prasanta Kumar Muduli, Pranaba Kishor Muduli
该评述介绍了一种在亚铁磁多层结构中通过磁体间自旋泵浦在子晶格之间重新平衡角动量耗散的机制，可在源端以更小能耗产生更大的自旋流，为低功耗自旋电子学提供了新思路。

item.title: 印刷器件迈向神经形态计算
item.description:
📚 Nature Nanotechnology
👤 Ruoyu Zhao, J. Joshua Yang
基于印刷二硫化钼纳米片网络构建的人工神经元，可在生理相关时间尺度上实现多阶尖峰动力学行为，为新一代生物-电子混合接口提供了可扩展的器件平台。

item.title: 受树干-枝杈结构启发的碳纤维/氮化硼网络支架用于散热与电磁干扰屏蔽
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Ning Jia, Yuan Ji, Wei Wang, Shichang Wang, Hong Wu, Shaoyun Guo 等7位作者
作者构筑了竖直碳纤维主干与氮化硼绝缘网络枝杈组成的异质支架，实现了双向高热导、电学绝缘以及以吸收为主的电磁干扰屏蔽性能，兼顾热管理与电磁防护需求。

item.title: 手性分子插层实现光控二维多铁异质结构
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Zhongxuan Wang, Yong Hu, Zhenyao Fang, Yixiao Wang, Peng Yan, Jiayue Sun, Mario Lopez, Ryan Stadel, Yuchen Niu, Joshua M. Little, Qimin Yan, Po-Yen Chen, Cheng Gong, Joseph W. Bennett, Genda Gu, Qiang Li, Zhijie Chen, Taylor J. Woehl, Efrain E. Rodriguez, Kai Liu, and Shenqiang Ren
该工作通过将手性分子插层进二维磁性材料，构筑可由光场调控的多铁异质结构，将手性、铁电与磁性自由度耦合，为光控自旋电子器件提供新范式。具体数据与结论详见原文。

item.title: 双斯格明子体系中的信息动力学与自然计算
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Hiroki Mori, Soma Miki, Kota Emoto, Ryo Ishikawa, Eiiti Tamura, Hikaru Nomura, Minori Goto, and Yoshishige Suzuki
作者在室温下实验研究了含两个磁斯格明子体系的概率性信息流动及其自然计算能力。该概率行为有望支持超低功耗的非常规计算范式，文中评估了系统的信息处理性能。

item.title: 非定常Taylor涡发电机是快速发电机
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Liam O’Connor, Daniel Lecoanet, Geoffrey M. Vasil, Kyle C. Augustson, Florentin Daniel, Evan H. Anders, Keaton J. Burns, Jeffrey S. Oishi, and Benjamin P. Brown
作者研究了非定常Taylor-Couette流中的运动学发电问题，发现即使在大磁雷诺数和湍流条件下，该流动也能作为“快速发电机”有效放大磁场，从而解释天体物理与地球物理中有序磁场的产生机制。

item.title: 低磁场下螺旋波等离子体的模式转变
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Landon D. Bevier and Justin M. Little
通过射频等离子体源实验与理论分析，作者揭示了在临界磁场下螺旋波放电模式与容性放电模式之间发生的突变型转变，并刻画了低场螺旋波模式转变的物理特征。

item.title: 双层反铁磁体中随磁态翻转的光电流
item.description:
📚 Physics News
该新闻报道介绍了在原子级薄双层反铁磁材料中观察到光电流方向随磁态切换而反转的现象，展示了原子尺度磁性材料在自旋光电子器件中的独特潜力。

item.title: 通过弹性热效应揭示磁阻挫
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eric C. Andrade, Pedro M. Cônsoli, Matthias Vojta
作者研究了空间各向异性三角与kagome晶格上Ising和Heisenberg模型在单轴应变下的熵和弹性Grüneisen比η。结果表明在最大阻挫点附近η在低温下发散，是经典自旋液体广延基态熵的普适标志；Heisenberg模型中多个零温相变主导低温η行为，为应变调控量子磁体的相图研究提供理论指引。

item.title: 范德华面缺陷无序对磁性拓扑绝缘体对称性的抑制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rikkie Joris, Heyi Xia, Ana Beatriz Pedro Fontes, Seul-Ki Bac, Sara Bey, Jiaqi Zhou, Zviadi Zarkua, Ahmed Samir Lotfy, Muhammed Saad, Philippe Ohresser, Margriet van Bael, Clement Merckling, Xinyu Liu, Francisco Molina-Lopez, Jean-Christophe Charlier, Jin Won Seo, Badih A. Assaf, Lino M. C. Pereira
通过惰性离子辐照在MnBi₂Te₄中引入本征缺陷，作者识别出两种区域：低剂量下阳离子反位无序导致Bi在阳离子位上重分布并将输运从p型转为n型；高剂量下阳离子-阴离子互混形成富含交换双层等范德华面缺陷的层状无序新相。磁性测量显示Mn高自旋态和反铁磁相互作用得以保留，而磁各向异性受到抑制。

item.title: 用扫描隧道显微镜可逆地在WTe₂上实现纳米尺度图案化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kevin Hauser, Danyang Liu, Berk Zengin, Jens Oppliger, Samuel Mañas-Valero, Catherine Witteveen, Fabian O. von Rohr, Jennifer E. Hoffman, Fabian D. Natterer
作者证明利用STM电流脉冲可在Weyl半金属候选材料WTe₂表面书写与擦除持久的纳米尺度图案。这些图案对应皮米量级的面内和面外原子位移以及局域态密度变化，分别体现了铁电极化翻转和Peierls类畸变的调制，并可重新定位，为基于WTe₂的低功耗器件提供新方法。

item.title: 无序系统中的强普适类
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Henrique A Lima, Kaue Hermann, Ismael S. S. Carrasco, Jairo R. L. de Almeida, Fernando A. Oliveira
作者基于Edwards-Anderson Hamiltonian，用蒙特卡洛模拟系统研究了无序磁性体系的磁化、关联函数、序参量和分形维数随无序的演化。在Fisher自关联函数框架基础上，引入分形分析以完整描述临界点的关联行为，从而界定无序系统所属的强普适类。

item.title: Itinerant antiferromagnetism in the antagonistic pair compound Y₄Co₃Ag
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rafaela F. S. Penacchio, Nao Furukawa, Joanna M. Blawat, John Singleton, Zhouqi Li, Raquel A. Ribeiro, Sérgio L. Morelhão, Sergey L. Bud'ko, Paul C. Canfield, Tyler J. Slade
arXiv:2605.15495v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Low dimensional crystallographic motifs have long been associated with desirable physical properties. The confinement of electrons to low dimensions is thought to enhance quantum fluctuations and may promote correlated phenomena. Here, using the antagonistic pair concept, we add Y to the immiscible Co-Ag pair to discover Y₄Co₃Ag. This compound adopts a monoclinic I2/m structure consisting of Y channels that are filled by one-dimensional zigzag and hexagonal Co chains, which extend along the crystallographic b-axis with no nearest neighbor contacts between Co and Ag atoms. Transport, magnetic, and specific heat measurements reveal that Y₄Co₃Ag orders antiferromagnetically at T_N=14.9 K with an effective magnetic moment μₑff = 1.4 μB/Co. Speci…

item.title: Entropy Production from Spin--Vibrational Coupling in Endohedral-Fullerene Qubits Encapsulated in Suspended Carbon Nanotubes
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Cristian Staii
arXiv:2605.15521v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid carbon nanotube-fullerene architectures provide a controllable platform for studying irreversibility and information flow in structured quantum environments. We analyze entropy generation in a system where paramagnetic endohedral fullerenes, such as N@C₆₀ and P@C₆₀, are encapsulated inside a suspended carbon nanotube (CNT) resonator, with selected multi-level fullerene spin states forming an effective qubit coupled to quantized CNT flexural modes. Building on prior work on fullerene-filled CNTs, spin-phonon control in suspended nanotubes, and phase-space propagators for damped driven oscillators, we develop a hybrid open-system model combining driven quantum Brownian motion of the CNT with an effective Jaynes-Cummings spin-vibrational…

item.title: Quantum Geometry-Driven Nonlinear Spin Currents in Floquet Non-Hermitian Altermagnets
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kai Chen, Jie Zhu
arXiv:2605.15541v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets are rapidly emerging as a highly promising platform for spintronics, yet dynamically controlling their spin responses remains a fundamental challenge. In this work, we demonstrate that introducing periodic optical driving and non-Hermiticity provides a powerful route to achieve tunable control over these systems. We derive a general analytical expression for nonlinear spin currents in non-Hermitian phases with a spectral line gap, revealing that the intrinsic response cleanly separates into quantum metric, Berry curvature, and Berry connection dipole contributions. Applying this formalism to a Floquet non-Hermitian d-wave altermagnet, we uncover that the nonlinear spin conductivity is overwhelmingly dominated by the bare quantum…

item.title: p-Wave Orbital Angular Momentum Texture in a Chiral Crystal
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dongjin Oh, Chiara Pacella, Xiangyu Luo, Chris Jozwiak, Aaron Bostwick, Eli Rotenberg, Mats Leandersson, Craig Polley, Angel Rubio, Domenico Di Sante, Riccardo Comin
arXiv:2605.15544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The spin and orbital angular momentum (SAM and OAM) are conceptually analogous, yet their roles in condensed matter systems have not been often treated on equal footing. While SAM has been extensively explored, OAM has long been regarded as quenched in crystalline environments and thus largely overlooked. Recent experimental and theoretical advances, however, have demonstrated that OAM can drive a variety of novel electronic phenomena, highlighting the importance of probing OAM textures in the electronic band structure. Here, we investigate the momentum-space OAM texture of (TaSe4)2I, a one-dimensional chiral crystal. Using circular-dichroism angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (CD-ARPES), we uncover a p-wave OAM texture accompanied by…

item.title: Non-Relativistic Spin-Orbit Interaction in Triplet Superconductors: Edelstein Effect and Spin Pumping by Electric Fields
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ping Li, G. A. Bobkov, I. V. Bobkova, Tao Yu
arXiv:2605.15610v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Non-relativistic momentum-dependent spin splitting, as observed in collinear altermagnets and non-collinear p-wave magnets, provides exciting avenues for controlling spin dynamics. Here, we reveal a distinct form of non-relativistic ``spin-orbit coupling" in triplet superconductors by demonstrating that the triplet order parameter induces a wave-vector-dependent spin texture of Bogoliubov quasiparticles, thereby entangling their orbital and spin motions. Even in the absence of relativistic spin-orbit coupling, this intertwining of spin and orbital motion allows an electric field to generate spin polarization in a p-wave superconductor -- that is, an Edelstein effect. Building on this mechanism, we propose an efficient scheme for the nonlinea…

item.title: Observation of flat-bottom U-shaped energy gap in high-Tc nickelate (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin films
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhen Liang, Tianheng Wei, Wei Ren, Haoran Ji, Zheyuan Xie, Yanzhao Liu, Ziqiang Wang, Jian Wang
arXiv:2605.15703v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The discovery of high transition temperature (high-Tc) superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper (R-P) bilayer nickelates under high pressure has stimulated extensive work to understand the underlying mechanism and search for superconductors with higher Tc. The recent realization of superconductivity in R-P bilayer nickelate thin films with onset Tc above 40 K at ambient-pressure enables the use of a wide array of powerful experimental tools to investigate the unconventional high-Tc superconductivity in bilayer nickelates. Here, using ultra-low temperature scanning tunneling microscopy/spectroscopy (STM/S) and electrical transport study, we report the first successful observation of an energy-symmetric, flat-bottom U-shaped gap with zero residu…

item.title: Equidistant resonance jumps in superconducting coplanar resonators driven by Abrikosov vortices
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dmitrii S. Kalashnikov, Denis Yu. Vodolazov, Ruslan I. Kinzibaev, Andrei G. Shishkin, Vasily S. Stolyarov
arXiv:2605.15751v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Superconducting coplanar resonators are key building blocks of cryogenic microwave circuits, yet their performance in perpendicular magnetic fields is ultimately limited by Abrikosov vortices. In this work we investigate the dependence of the transmission parameter S₂₁ of niobium quarter-wave coplanar resonators on perpendicular magnetic fields up to 40 Oe and at temperatures between 18 mK and 5 K. Beyond the reversible Meissner regime, the entire resonance peak exhibits abrupt, staircase-like jumps as a function of magnetic field. Upon reversal of the field sweep, these jumps form an almost equidistant series with spacing 1.7-1.8 Oe, which, in agreement with theoretical estimates, we interpret as signatures of multiple-vortex entry and exit…

item.title: Thermodynamic signatures of a field-induced ordered intermediate phase in Na₂Co₂TeO₆
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Prashanta K. Mukarjee, Sebastian Erdmann, R. Kalaivanan, R. Sankar, Kwang-Yong Choi, Alexander A. Tsirlin, Philipp Gegenwart
arXiv:2605.15829v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The honeycomb cobaltate Na₂Co₂TeO₆ has recently been proposed as a candidate material for hosting field-induced quantum spin liquid (QSL) behavior. Here, we present a comprehensive thermodynamic study of its low-temperature, high-field phase diagram using magnetization, specific heat, and magnetocaloric-effect measurements down to 1 K. In zero field, we observe a weak residual moment that provides further insight into the nature of the magnetic ground state. For in-plane magnetic fields (B parallel a^*), we identify three field-induced transitions at Bc₁ simeq 6 T, Bc₂ simeq 7.8 T, and Bc₃ simeq 10.4 T. The magnetic Grüneisen parameter and specific heat reveal clear thermodynamic signatures of these successive phase transitions enclosing two…

item.title: Stable magnetic nanodomains engineered via Ga+-ion irradiation for deterministic sequential switching
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gijs W. A. Simons, Rik F. J. van Haren, Bert Koopmans
arXiv:2605.15883v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Precise control of magnetic domain formation at the nanoscale remains constrained by stochastic defect-mediated and unstable pinning, limiting scalability and reproducibility in spintronic architectures. Here we demonstrate that spatially engineered anisotropy gradients provide a deterministic alternative. Using focused Ga+-ion irradiation, we pattern magnetic energy landscapes containing nanoscale "anisotropy wells" that confine magnetic domain walls and enable bidirectional sequential switching without reliance on difficult-to-control material disorder. An analytical framework describing domain-wall energetics in graded anisotropy profiles yields predictive design rules for depinning and stability, which are supported by micromagnetic simu…

item.title: Solving Classical and Quantum Spin Glasses with Deep Boltzmann Quantum States
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luca Leone, Arka Dutta, Markus Heyl, Enrico Prati, Pietro Torta
arXiv:2605.15899v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Variational neural network models have achieved remarkable success in solving ground-state problems of quantum many-body systems. However, addressing classical and quantum spin glasses remains challenging, as disorder and energy frustration give rise to an exponentially large number of local energy minima separated by high-energy barriers, hindering the efficiency of conventional Metropolis-based Monte Carlo methods. To bridge this gap, we introduce Deep Boltzmann Quantum States, a class of neural quantum states inspired by deep Boltzmann machines that inherit efficient block Gibbs sampling. We also propose two key advances in the training algorithm. Firstly, we combine natural-gradient updates with state-of-the-art stochastic optimizers. Se…

item.title: Active Model B⁻ from Mass-Conserving Reaction-Diffusion Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Davide Toffenetti, Beatrice Nettuno, Henrik Weyer, Erwin Frey
arXiv:2605.15903v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We show that the late-time dynamics of a minimal three-component mass-conserving reaction--diffusion system reduce to a scalar active field theory, Active Model B⁻ (AMB⁻⁾, in which a density-dependent interfacial coefficient κ(φ) turns negative at high density. This drives a finite-wavelength instability and stabilises microphase-separated patterns, in contrast to the unbounded coarsening of two-component mass-conserving systems. Unlike Active Model B⁺, AMB⁻ retains a chemical potential that remains a state function, inherited from the underlying conservation law, but admits no equation of state for the pressure.

item.title: Actin cross-linking organizes basal body patterning through anomalous diffusion transitions
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Raghavan Thiagarajan, Younes Farhangi Barooji, Poul-Martin Bendix, Mandar M. Inamdar, Jakub Sedzinski
arXiv:2605.15912v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Subcellular protein complexes and organelles exhibit diverse dynamic behaviors that reflect the mechanical constraints and organization of the intracellular environment. Although some structures follow classical Brownian motion, many display anomalous dynamics. The transitions between these regimes are increasingly recognized as critical for subcellular organization, yet how they influence pattern formation remains unclear. Here, we investigate the spatial arrangement of cilia on the apical surface of multiciliated cells (MCCs) in developing Xenopus laevis embryos, where coordinated ciliary beating depends on the precise organization of hundreds of centriole-derived basal bodies (BBs). Using quantitative confocal, high-resolution and high-sp…

item.title: 双极磁性半导体中可调谐的交叉安德烈夫反射
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Polireddi Naveen, Abhiram Soori
交叉安德烈夫反射（CAR）是一种非局域量子输运现象，发生在超导体与两个空间分离金属的界面处。该研究提出在双极磁性半导体（BMS）中，通过独立调节两个区域的化学势来实现CAR的可控调控。利用BMS导带和价带具有相反自旋极化的特性，通过设计两个BMS电极的自旋极化能带对齐，可选择性地增强或抑制CAR，从而实现对非局域输运和相关电子动力学的精确操控。

item.title: 离散螺旋中的轨道角动量纹理与电流：平衡态与线性响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Danny Cordova, Bertrand Berche, Ernesto Medina
该工作构建了一个最小化的三轨道紧束缚模型来描述单螺旋链，证明仅手性即可通过Slater-Koster杂化产生动量依赖的轨道角动量纹理，无需原子自旋-轨道耦合。在单螺旋几何中，径向轨道纹理恒为零，而方位角和纵向分量保持有限。平衡态平均轨道纹理因宇称而消失，但可能存在类持久的轨道角动量电流，导致有限螺旋链的手性依赖端面磁化。施加纵向电场时，系统产生有限的轨道Edelstein响应，而投影纵向轨道电流电导率在线性区因宇称而消失。

item.title: 有限温度下谐波囚禁Tonks-Girardeau气体Tan's contact的大N标度
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Felipe Taha Sant'Ana
该研究推导了有限温度下N个谐波囚禁Tonks-Girardeau玻色子在正则系综中大N极限下Tan's contact的标度行为。首项标度系数重现了局域密度近似结果，通过围道积分表示和鞍点约化获得；次领头系数是本文核心新结果，可用Fermi因子的普适相空间积分显式表示，具有封闭的Sommerfeld和位力极限，并对应于固定平均粒子数下正则系综与巨正则系综之差。高温Boltzmann区，次领头与领头系数之比坍缩为普适值，源于稀薄巨正则气体的Poisson粒子数统计。

item.title: 基于相图预测对铅的经验与机器学习原子间势的基准测试
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tom Hellyar, Pascal T. Salzbrenner, Peter I. C. Cooke, Chris J. Pickard, Scott Habershon, Livia B. Pártay
该研究比较了三种原子间势模型（嵌入原子法EAM、修正嵌入原子法MEAM、以及基于神经网络的短暂数据衍生势EDDP）对铅相行为的预测。利用嵌套采样和副本交换嵌套采样模拟，计算了高达60 GPa的热力学和结构性质，绘制了熔化行为和固相稳定性。EAM和MEAM模型均预测面心立方（FCC）相稳定至约60 GPa，而EDDP模型成功捕捉到实验观测的FCC到六角密堆（HCP）转变（约15 GPa），凸显了训练数据和模型灵活性在准确描述高压相行为中的重要性。

item.title: 亚稳态MnSb₂和YbZn₂相的激光加热金刚石压砧合成技术与回收流程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 S. Huyan, R. F. S. Penacchio, D. Zhang, Z. Li, S. L. Morelhão, Raquel Ribeiro, P. C. Canfield, S. L. Bud'ko
该工作开发了一套集成的激光加热金刚石压砧（LHDAC）合成方法，实现了亚稳金属间相的稳定化和回收，用于后续结构和输运研究。在中等压力下成功合成了高压MnSb₂和YbZn₂相，同步辐射X射线衍射和空间mapping确认了目标相的主导形成，实验室精修定量了相分数。对回收样品的高压输运测量揭示了压力可调的电学性质，为极端条件下新材料的系统回收和物性表征提供了实用工作流程。

item.title: 低维磁体理论研究中的球对称方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. F. Barabanov, V. E. Valiulin, A. V. Mikheyenkov, P. S. Savchenkov
该综述介绍了球对称自洽方法及其相关理论算法的主要思想和重要结果。这些方法可研究低维Heisenberg型自旋模型（包括受挫系统），严格考虑Mermin-Wagner定理、Marshall定理以及格点自旋约束，避免了传统分析低维磁系统时可能出现的困难。该方法还可应用于自旋-赝自旋模型，并嵌入更复杂的构造中，用于研究含自由载流子的自旋模型，如基本和三带Hubbard模型、t-J模型、s-d模型以及Kondo晶格。

item.title: 石墨烯多层中谷极化的输运特征：面内线磁电导与反常霍尔效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fernando Peñaranda, Fernando de Juan
该研究提出奇数阶磁场依赖的面内线磁电导（LMC）作为谷极化的替代探测手段，即使在反常霍尔效应（AHE）消失时仍可存在。在多层结构中，该效应源于层间隧穿 enable 的面内轨道矩和Berry曲率，且主导于自旋响应。以转角双层石墨烯（LMC有限但AHE消失，除非衬底额外破缺对称性）和菱方石墨烯多层（LMC与AHE均追踪谷极化）为例，通过自洽Hartree-Fock和半经典输运理论进行了分析。

item.title: 半导体器件与二维异质结的原位关联SEM/KPFM表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Prabhu Prasad Swain, Nahid Hosseini, Eveline. S Mayner, Aleksandra Radenovic, Marcos Penedo, Georg E. Fantner
该工作首次实现了在扫描电子显微镜内部基于压阻悬臂梁的单通外差Kelvin探针力显微镜（KPFM）原位测量。通过解调激励和检测信号，克服了压阻悬臂梁固有的电容串扰，实现了表面形貌和接触电势差的同时mapping，并与成分分析相关联。系统比较了不同操作模式的空间分辨率、信号灵敏度和信噪比，揭示了电子束扫描参数对表面电势的直接影响，为纳米尺度电子-结构关联表征提供了新工具。

item.title: 钙钛矿量子点到多功能配体（含 tethered 分子物种）的电荷转移
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mariam Kurashvili, Lena S. Stickel, Jordi Llusar, Christian Wilhelm, Fabian Felixberger, Ivana Ivanović-Burmazović, Ivan Infante, Jochen Feldmann, Quinten A. Akkerman
该研究设计了含季铵结合基团（强pQD表面附着）、长尾链（胶体稳定性）和近表面功能基团的多功能配体，用于钙钛矿量子点（pQDs）。以二茂铁功能化配体为例，实现了近 unity 效率的光激发空穴转移。密度泛函理论计算揭示了空穴转移后二茂铁分子结构重组及其对电荷分离效率的影响。该策略可拓展至光激发电子和能量转移过程，为光催化等应用的高效QD-分子杂化材料提供了设计蓝图。

item.title: 机器学习势作为超难熔多组元陶瓷共晶设计的向导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 V. E. Valiulin, A. V. Mikheyenkov, N. M. Chtchelkatchev, E. A. Levashov
该工作提出了一种确定超难熔合金共晶点浓度的新判据，以Ti-B-C体系（研究最充分的三组元难熔体系）验证。算法核心为基于神经网络的原子间机器学习势，精度媲美从头算方法，且关键能在液相有效工作，无需固相晶体结构信息即可估计共晶点。该方法为熔点超过3000 K的超难熔材料实验探索提供了AI指导的前置筛选工具。

item.title: 无序高熵尖晶石铬铁矿中的长程磁有序与结构相变
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sushanta Mandal, Koushik Chakraborty, Isha, Arvind Kumar Yogi, S. D. Kaushik, Sourav Marik, Tirthankar Chakraborty
该研究系统研究了两种Cr基高熵尖晶石(Mn₀.₂Co₀.₂Ni₀.₂Cu₀.₂Zn₀.₂)Cr₂O₄和(Mg₀.₂Co₀.₂Ni₀.₂Cu₀.₂Zn₀.₂)Cr₂O₄的温度演化结构和磁性。两者室温均为立方Fd-3m结构，分别在49 K和35 K以下反铁磁有序，中子衍射证实长程螺旋磁有序。两者分别在约55 K和85 K发生立方到正交Fddd的结构相变。尽管A位存在显著化学无序，两体系仍表现出类似低熵尖晶石的转变，表明高构型熵可能促进全局结构稳定。

item.title: 蠕变中损伤驱动晶界应力的因果引导机制识别与可解释降阶建模
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Weichen Kong, Yanwei Dai, Yinglin Zhang, Yinghua Liu
该研究结合位错攀移影响的晶体塑性有限元模拟与因果引导机器学习框架，识别控制晶界（GB）法向应力的关键特征并建立可解释降阶预测模型。在18个物理启发的特征中，GB倾角、滑移传递、攀移相关Schmid型指标和弹性模量失配被确定为支配因素，揭示了界面几何、晶体学兼容性、蠕变应力松弛和微观力学约束的耦合作用。因果熵分析用于机制识别，最终蒸馏为回归形式的降阶模型。

item.title: Thermal conductivity of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO₂: A comparative study
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Doyoon Park, Yihang Peng, Jie Deng
arXiv:2605.16123v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Thermal conductivity is a fundamental material property that plays a crucial role in understanding the dynamics and evolution of planetary interiors. Despite its importance, the thermal conductivity of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO₂ remains unknown. Here, we calculate the lattice thermal conductivities of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO₂ using the Green-Kubo method based on molecular dynamics (MD) simulations driven by two machine learning potentials (MLPs) constructed from the SCAN and PBEsol exchange-correlation functionals, with ab initio-level accuracy. To demonstrate our methodology, we also compute thermal conductivities using the phonon quasiparticle approach for comparison. Overall, the Green-Kubo method predicts up to 119 % higher t…

item.title: Bridging Atomistic Simulation and Experimental Processing Timescales with Goal-Directed Deep Reinforcement Learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wonseok Jeong, Francesca Tavazza, Brian DeCost
arXiv:2605.16214v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Atomic-scale modeling has advanced rapidly through integration of machine learning, yet a key bottleneck remains. Even with an accurate potential energy surface and a clear target material, we still lack a practical atomistic dynamics framework that can simulate how materials form under realistic synthesis and processing conditions. Many processing transformations are governed by rare events in non-idealized evolving environments, while direct molecular dynamics is limited by femtosecond timesteps and short accessible trajectories. Existing acceleration methods often require prior mechanistic knowledge, including reaction coordinates, collective variables, event tables, or pathway guesses, which is rarely available in real experiments. Here…

item.title: Lattice Relaxation Flattens Chern Bands in Rhombohedral Graphene Stacks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luca Nashabeh, Héctor Ochoa
arXiv:2605.16218v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motivated by recent observations of integer and fractional Chern insulators in rhombohedral graphene stacks aligned with hexagonal boron nitride (hBN), we propose and study a model in which the moiré potential is defined by the pattern of layer-shear strain fields produced by lattice relaxation in these heterostructures. Although these strain fields decrease exponentially with the number of layers, their imprints on electrons residing away from the contact layer are non-negligible. In the absence of a displacement field, lattice relaxation effects amplify the electronic differences among the two different stackings with hBN. These differences, although attenuated at the single-electron level, survive in the so-called moiré-distant regime and…

item.title: Universal Magnetic Structure Prediction from Atomic Coordinates with Near-Experimental Accuracy
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Abhijatmedhi Chotrattanapituk, Ryotaro Okabe, Eunbi Rha, Mariya Al-Hinai, Eugene Jiang, Daniel Pajerowski, Yongqiang Cheng, Joshua J. Turner, Mingda Li
arXiv:2605.16230v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Magnetic order is a fundamental property of materials, governing collective behavior and enabling a broad range of functionalities. Yet magnetic structure remains difficult to determine: experiments are costly and specialized, while first-principles methods often struggle with the noncollinear and incommensurate orders found in real materials. Here we introduce magnetic structure network (MSN), an E(3) equivariant graph neural network that predicts both collinear and non-collinear magnetic structures directly from atomic crystal structures, trained directly on experimentally determined structures from MAGNDATA. By proposing the primitive modulated structure representation (PMSR), we are able to encode commensurate and incommensurate structur…

item.title: Acoustic spin resonance in polariton condensates
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 D. A. Saltykova, A. Kudlis, A. V. Yulin, I. A. Shelykh
arXiv:2605.16236v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically investigate acoustic spin resonance in a spatially homogeneous spinor polariton condensate. A longitudinal acoustic wave generates a time-periodic strain-induced effective magnetic field acting on the condensate pseudospin. When this field is transverse to the static in-plane linear-polarization splitting, it resonantly drives polarization oscillations. We show that spin-dependent interactions shift the resonance and produce nonlinear line shapes, while gain, reservoir dynamics, and spin relaxation make the response dissipative and history-dependent, producing amplitude hysteresis. In the presence of lifetime anisotropy, the condensate can develop a bifurcated stationary state with finite circular polarization, and a resonan…

item.title: Near-degenerate competing magnetic orders in EuAgAs: a tunable route to altermagnetism
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mohamed El Gazzah, Daniel Kaplan, Zachary Morgan, Abhijeet Nayak Resham Regmi, Sk Jamaluddin, Huibo Cao, Igor I. Mazin, Nirmal J. Ghimire
arXiv:2605.16242v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets (AMs) have recently emerged as a distinct magnetic class bridging central features of ferromagnets (FMs) and antiferromagnets (AFMs), offering new opportunities for spin-based electronics. While they possess zero net magnetization like collinear AFMs, they simultaneously exhibit momentum-dependent spin splitting long thought exclusive to FMs. Despite intense theoretical interest, experimentally accessible materials hosting both altermagnetism and nontrivial band topology remain scarce. EuAgAs, crystallizing in space group P6₃/mmc, was previously identified via density functional theory (DFT) as a bulk altermagnetic Dirac semimetal. Contrary to these predictions, our neutron diffraction experiments reveal that the bulk ground sta…

item.title: Thermodynamic Networks: Harnessing Non-Equilibrium Steady States for Computation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Patryk Lipka-Bartosik, Gianmichele Blasi, Javier Lalueza Puértolas, Géraldine Haack, Martí Perarnau-Llobet, Nicolas Brunner
arXiv:2605.15985v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce thermodynamic networks, a general framework for autonomous, physics-based computation using non-equilibrium steady states. These networks are modeled as a collection of finite-size reservoirs that exchange conserved quantities--such as electric charge or molecular number--while relaxing to a non-equilibrium steady state, which encodes the solution of a computational problem. We identify Negative Differential Conductance (NDC) as the critical physical property governing the computational expressivity of the thermodynamic network. While networks lacking NDC are restricted to computing monotonic functions, the presence of NDC enables universal function approximation. For the training of the network, we use protocols that take adv…

item.title: Beyond Commutativity: Redesigning Trotter Decomposition via Local Symmetry
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Naoki Negishi, Bo Yang
arXiv:2605.16016v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The product formula, commonly known as Trotter decomposition, is a central tool for digital quantum simulation, whose performance depends critically on how the Hamiltonian is partitioned into tractable blocks. Standard decompositions typically rely on direct commutativity among Hamiltonian terms in a chosen operator representation, which can lead to large residual errors and deep circuits for complex, practically relevant many-body quantum systems. We address this fundamental bottleneck by introducing a new decomposition principle that goes beyond commutativity, grouping Hamiltonian terms into local three-site clusters according to the underlying SU(2) symmetry of the local dynamics. We show that three-site generators fall into at most fou…

item.title: Variational Autoregressive Networks with probability priors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Piotr Białas, Piotr Korcyl, Tomasz Stebel, Dawid Zapolski
arXiv:2605.16020v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Monte Carlo methods are essential across diverse scientific fields, yet their efficiency is frequently hampered by critical slowing down-a sharp increase in autocorrelation times near phase transitions. Although deep learning approaches, such as neural-network-based samplers, have been proposed to alleviate this issue, they face another serious problem: the difficulty of training the models. This difficulty partially stems from the overly general nature of original machine-learning architectures, which often ignore underlying physical symmetries and force networks to relearn them from scratch. In this paper, we demonstrate that incorporating physical priors into the model significantly enhances performance. Building upon existing strategie…

item.title: A Unified Framework for the Non-Hermitian Localization: Boundary-Insensitive Modes and Electric-Magnetic Analogy
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zheng Wei, Ji-Yao Fan, Kui Cao, Xin-Ran Ma, Cui-Xian Guo, Xue-Ping Ren, Su-Peng Kou
arXiv:2505.10252v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The non-Hermitian skin effect is fundamentally characterized by its sensitivity to boundary conditions, reflected in changes to the energy spectrum and boundary-localized eigenstates. Here, we demonstrate that a spatially inhomogeneous imaginary scalar potential field induces a skin effect that is insensitive to boundary conditions. Both the spectrum and eigenstate distribution remain invariant, a behavior not captured by existing theories. We attribute this anomaly to translational symmetry breaking induced by spatially varying imaginary potentials in finite systems. We further formulate a theory that universally predicts localization in single-particle non-Hermitian systems. This framework classifies skin effects into two fundamental t…

item.title: Chladni states in Ising Spin Lattices
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Giulio Iannelli, Pablo Villegas
arXiv:2507.05961v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Low-temperature spin dynamics can become trapped in long-lived patterns shaped by the geometry of the interaction network. Here we introduce Chladni states: spin configurations obtained by binarizing the eigenmodes of the interaction Laplacian. These graph-spectral patterns organize the metastable configurations reached by Ising systems under non-ergodic relaxation. The resulting Topological Mode Decomposition provides a compact way to monitor and reconstruct frozen spin configurations in ferromagnets, frustrated antiferromagnets, and spin glasses.

item.title: Superconductivity in RbH₁₂ at low pressures: an emphab initio study
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 DJordje Dangić, Manex Alkorta, Yuewen Fang, Ion Errea
arXiv:2507.12183v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: High-pressure polyhydrides are leading contenders for room temperature superconductivity. The next frontier lies in stabilizing them at ambient pressure, which would allow their practical applications. In this first-principles computational study, we investigate the potential for record-low pressure stabilization of binary superhydrides within the RbH₁₂ system including lattice quantum anharmonic effects in the calculations. We identify five competing phases for the pressure range between 0 and 100 GPa. Incorporating anharmonic and quantum effects on ion dynamics, we find the Immm and P6₃/mmc phases to be the most probable, potentially metastable even at pressures as low as 10 GPa. Notably, all phases exhibit metallic properties, with cr…

item.title: Domain-Wall Mediated Polarization Switching in Ferroelectric AlScN: Strain Relief and Field-Dependent Dynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiangyu Zheng, Charles Paillard, Dawei Wang, Peng Chen, Hong Jian Zhao, Yu Xie, Laurent Bellaiche
arXiv:2509.00705v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: While scandium-doped aluminum nitride (AlScN) exhibits robust ferroelectricity and excellent thermal stability, its utility is limited by an exceptionally high coercive field (E_c) for polarization switching. Unraveling the atomistic switching dynamics is therefore critical for tailoring E_c. Here, we combine density functional theory and machine-learning molecular dynamics to elucidate the polarization switching mechanisms in AlScN over various Sc concentrations and applied electric fields. We find that excessive lattice strain strictly prohibits collective polarization switching, but the pre-existing domain walls relieve strain and lead to a distinct switching dynamics -- dictating a field-dependent switching mechanism. At low electric…

item.title: Inherent momentum-dependent gap structure of altermagnetic superconductors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Christian L. H. Rasmussen, Jannik Gondolf, Mats Barkman, Mercè Roig, Daniel F. Agterberg, Andreas Kreisel, Brian M. Andersen
arXiv:2509.03247v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Altermagnetic metals break time-reversal symmetry and feature spin-split Fermi surfaces generated by compensated Néel-ordered collinear magnetic moments. Being metallic, such altermagnets may undergo a further instability at low temperatures to a superconducting state, and it is an interesting open question what the salient features are of such altermagnetic superconductors. We address this question on the basis of realistic microscopic models that capture the altermagnetic sublattice degrees of freedom. We find that the sublattice structure can strongly affect the superconducting gap structure in altermagnetic superconductors. In particular, it imposes nodes in the gap on the Brillouin zone edges for superconductors stabilized by moment…

item.title: Far-field radiation of bulk, edge and corner eigenmodes from a finite 2D Su-Schrieffer-Heeger plasmonic lattice
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Álvaro Buendía, José Luis Pura, Vincenzo Giannini, José Antonio Sánchez Gil
arXiv:2510.08063v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Subwavelength arrays of plasmonic nanoparticles allow us to control the behaviour of light at the nanoscale. Here, we develop an eigenmode analysis, employing a coupled electromagnetic dipole formalism, which permits us to isolate the contribution to the far-field radiation of each array mode. Specifically, we calculate the far-field radiation patterns by bulk, edge and corner out-of-plane eigenmodes in a finite 2D Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) array of plasmonic nanoparticles with out-of-plane dipolar resonances. The breaking of symmetries in multipartite unit cells is exploited to tailor the optical properties and far-field radiation of the resonant modes. We prove that the antisymmetric modes are darker and have higher Q-factors than the…

item.title: Strongly enhanced lifetime of higher-order bimerons and antibimerons
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shiwei Zhu, Moritz A. Goerzen, Changsheng Song, Stefan Heinze, Dongzhe Li
arXiv:2510.25478v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Magnetic bimerons, similar to skyrmions, are topologically nontrivial spin textures characterized by topological charge Q. Most studies so far have focused on low-Q solitons (|Q| łeq 1), such as skyrmions, bimerons, and vortices. Here, we present the first calculations of the lifetimes of ring-like high-Q bimerons and demonstrate that they are fundamentally more stable than high-Q skyrmions over a wide range of temperature. To obtain realistic results, our chosen system is an experimentally feasible van der Waals interface, Fe₃GeTe₂/Cr₂Ge₂Te₆. We show that the lifetimes of high-Q (anti)bimerons can exceed the lifetime of those with |Q|=1 by 3 orders of magnitude. Remarkably, this trend remains valid even when extrapolated to room tempera…

item.title: Spin and orbital excitations in undoped infinite layers: a comparison between superconducting PrNiO2 and insulating CaCuO2
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Francesco Rosa, Hoshang Sahib, Giacomo Merzoni, Leonardo Martinelli, Riccardo Arpaia, Nicholas B. Brookes, Daniele Di Castro, Krzysztof Wohlfeld, Maryia Zinouyeva, Marco Salluzzo, Daniele Preziosi, Giacomo Ghiringhelli
arXiv:2511.02448v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Infinite-layer nickelates are among the most promising cuprate-akin superconductors, although relevant differences from copper oxides have been reported. Here, we present momentum- and polarization-resolved RIXS measurements on chemically undoped, superconducting PrNiO2, and compare its magnetic and orbital excitations with those of the reference infinite layer cuprate CaCuO2. In PrNiO2, the in-plane magnetic exchange integrals are smaller than in CaCuO2, whereas the out-of-plane values are similar, indicating that both materials support a three-dimensional antiferromagnetic order. Orbital excitations, associated to the transitions within 3d states of the metal, are well reproduced within a single-ion model and display similar characteri…

item.title: Role of impurity statistics and medium constraints in polaron-polaron interactions
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jesper Levinsen, Francesca Maria Marchetti, Olivier Bleu, Meera M. Parish
arXiv:2512.01413v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We consider the behavior of a small density of mobile impurities (polarons) immersed in a quantum gas, a generic scenario that can be realized in cold atomic gases, liquid helium mixtures, and doped semiconductors. We present a unified theoretical framework for understanding polaron quasiparticles beyond the single-impurity limit, and we identify two key factors that control the polaron-polaron interactions: (i) the statistics of the impurities, including whether or not they are degenerate, and (ii) the constraints on the medium response, i.e., whether the medium density or chemical potential is held fixed. By constructing wave functions for two bosonic, fermionic, or distinguishable impurities immersed in a Bose or Fermi gas, we derive…

item.title: The effects of alloy disorder on strongly-driven flopping mode qubits in Si/SiGe
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Merritt P. R. Losert, Utkan Güngördü, S. N. Coppersmith, Mark Friesen, Charles Tahan
arXiv:2512.19658v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In Si quantum dot systems, large magnetic field gradients are needed to implement spin rotations via electric dipole spin resonance (EDSR). By increasing the effective electron dipole, flopping mode qubits can provide faster gates with smaller field gradients. Moreover, operating in the strong-driving limit can reduce their sensitivity to charge noise. However, alloy disorder in Si/SiGe heterostructures randomizes the valley energy splitting and the valley phase difference between dots, enhancing the probably of valley excitations while tunneling between the dots, and opening a leakage channel. In this work, we analyze the performance of flopping mode spin qubits in the presence of charge noise and alloy disorder, and we optimize these q…

item.title: Reentrant Superconductivity from Competing Spin-Triplet Instabilities
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jun Goryo
arXiv:2512.23954v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Reentrant superconductivity in strong magnetic fields challenges the conventional expectation that magnetic fields necessarily suppress superconductivity. We show that reentrant superconducting instability can arise from the competition between spin-unpolarized and spin-polarized superconducting channels. Using a minimal Ginzburg--Landau theory with two coupled spin-triplet order parameters, we demonstrate that a magnetic field can reorganize the hierarchy of superconducting instabilities, yielding a characteristic reentrant instability curve over a broad parameter range.

item.title: Deconfined quantum criticality with internal supersymmetry
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhi-Qiang Gao, Hui Yang, Yan-Qi Wang
arXiv:2601.14398v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Deconfined quantum critical point (DQCP) describes direct, non-fine-tuned quantum phase transition between two ordered phases that break distinct and seemingly unrelated symmetries, providing a route to continuous phase transition beyond the conventional Ginzburg--Landau paradigm. In this work we extend the DQCP paradigm to systems with internal supersymmetry (SUSY), where the on-site Hilbert space furnishes a representation of a Lie superalgebra, and the Hamiltonian is invariant under the corresponding Lie supergroup. Focusing on the minimal supersymmetric generalization of spin SU(2), namely OSp(1|2), we propose a supersymmetric deconfined quantum critical point (sDQCP) between a phase that breaks internal OSp(1|2) and a phase that ins…

item.title: Imaging flat band electron hydrodynamics in biased bilayer graphene
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Canxun Zhang, Evgeny Redekop, Hari Stoyanov, Jack H. Farrell, Sunghoon Kim, Ludwig Holleis, David Gong, Aidan Keough, Youngjoon Choi, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Martin E. Huber, Ania C. Bleszynski Jayich, Andrew Lucas, Andrea F. Young
arXiv:2603.11175v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Hydrodynamic electron transport arises when carrier kinetics are dominated by interelectron collisions rather than the relaxation of momentum out of the electron system. In recent years, signatures of electron hydrodynamics have been reported in graphene devices owing to the low disorder and weak electron-phonon coupling. However, these experiments have been performed in regimes where the carrier mass is light, and the electron-electron collision length--though smaller than corresponding lengths for phonon or impurity scattering--remains large in absolute terms, typically several hundred nanometers. This restricts hydrodynamic transport phenomena to large length scales, limiting miniaturization of devices based on hydrodynamic flow. The…

item.title: Tensor Cross Interpolation of Purities in Quantum Many-Body Systems
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dmytro Kolisnyk, Raimel A. Medina, Romain Vasseur, Maksym Serbyn
arXiv:2503.17230v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: A defining feature of quantum many-body systems is the exponential scaling of the Hilbert space with the number of degrees of freedom. This exponential complexity naïvely renders a complete state characterization, for instance via the complete set of bipartite Renyi entropies for all disjoint regions, a challenging task. Recently, a compact way of storing subregions' purities by encoding them as amplitudes of a fictitious quantum wave function, known as entanglement feature, was proposed. Notably, the entanglement feature can be a simple object even for highly entangled quantum states. However the complexity and practical usage of the entanglement feature for general quantum states has not been explored. In this work, we demonstrat…

item.title: Motional-Current-Sensing Method and Simplified Closed-Loop Control Strategy for Piezoelectric-Resonator-based DC-DC Converters
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhiyang Cao, Linbo Shao, Liyan Zhu
arXiv:2605.15279v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Piezoelectric resonators (PRs) have been seen as a competitive alternative to magnetic components. In PR-based converters, the motional current (in the LC series branch of the equivalent circuit) is vital for control proposes but cannot be measured directly. The difficulties to detect the zero-crossing points or to measure the amplitude of the motional current has been one of the most dominating obstacles that complicates the control strategies and limits the frequency range of the PR-based converters. This work discusses a ring-dot shaped piezoelectric transformer (PT) based motional current sensing method that provides current information with low-delay, low-loss and intrinsic isolation. It is physically proven that the proposed method is…

item.title: 电子-离子对撞机桶部成像量能器韩国研究进展
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jeongsu Bok
电子-离子对撞机（EIC）是用于探测核子质量、自旋及夸克胶子动力学等物质基本结构的下一代粒子加速器设施。桶部成像量能器（BIC）作为桶区电磁量能器，负责精确测量电子和光子能量并有效分离背景π介子，采用Pb/SciFi取样层与AstroPix硅像素传感器实现三维簇射成像。韩国团队在硅芯片测试、模块组装、原型研制、束流测试、读出系统设计及详细模拟等方面作出积极贡献，本文介绍韩国BIC研发的最新进展与未来计划。

item.title: 混合折射-衍射系统建模与优化的通用可微光线-波动框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jiazhou Cheng, Margaret Gao, Yixuan Shao, Chenkai Mao, Tom D. Milster, Jonathan A. Fan
本文提出一种可微光线-波动框架，作为混合折射-衍射光学系统的通用模型，可嵌入标准光线追迹流程即插即用。该框架独特适用于平面及曲面的衍射表面，能够处理具有高空间频率响应的任意全息衍射轮廓。研究分析了最优考虑衍射表面空间频率特性与空间曲率的光线-波动建模 regime，并展示了含平面及共形衍射表面的混合系统的梯度端到端优化，有望推动计算成像与显示应用中的新型混合光学系统发展。

item.title: 脉冲功率驱动磁重联实验中外加磁场导致的电流片形成延迟
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 T. W. O. Varnish, G. V. Dowhan, M. Chen, D. M. Johnson, N. M. Jordan, J. Lee, A. P. Shah, R. Shapovalov, B. J. Sporer, R. D. McBride, J. D. Hare
本研究通过脉冲功率驱动两个平行爆炸丝阵产生碰撞等离子体流，形成1.2±0.2 T的反平行磁场，并利用亥姆霍兹线圈对外施加最高2 T的平行于重联电场的外磁场。零场及弱外场（0.5 T）下观察到两丝阵间形成致密重联层，而强外场（2 T）下则出现空腔而非致密层；推测外场被等离子体冻结并产生背压以减速流动。三维磁流体动力学模拟定性支持该假设，揭示了外场对重联动力学的重要调控作用。

item.title: 磁约束聚变等离子体中小尺度重联对高能离子的再加速
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Cong Zhang, Shaodong Song, Di Luo, Kai Huang, Linge Zang, Huibo Tang, Yanchao Li, Yihang Zhao, Ao Wang, Hanqing Wang, Zhenxing Wang, Lei Han, Xuxu Zhang, Jia Li, Dong Guo, Yunfeng Liang, Minsheng Liu, Yuejiang Shi
研究首次在EXL-50U球形托卡马克上观测到中性束注入的高能粒子可在无显著大尺度MHD爆发情况下稳定加速至注入能量的2.5倍。基于EXL-50U参数的模拟表明，由多个磁岛介导的小尺度磁重联无法加速本底热离子，但能高效 energize 种子快离子。与全局MHD事件不同，此类小尺度重联在磁约束装置中普遍存在且不劣化芯部约束，为未来聚变堆提供了一种新颖且可能普适的辅助离子加热通道。

item.title: 参量驱动纯四次孤子
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pengfei Li, Lijing Xing, Dongdong Wang, Dumitru Mihalache, David Laroze, Boris A. Malomed
本文报告在含二阶群速度色散、线性损耗、参量增益及立方非线性的完整系统中存在静止参量驱动纯四次孤子（PDPQS），以及在无损耗情况下存在运动PDPQS。系统分析揭示了孤子在参数空间中的稳定性区域，并探索了不稳定态的演化行为，证明了稳定行波PDPQS之间的碰撞为弹性碰撞。该工作将参量驱动孤子研究拓展至纯四次色散 regime，丰富了光学、磁学等物理系统中的自陷模态理论。

item.title: 关于时间：光学频率时间反射的观测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ohad Segal (Electrical & Computer Eng. Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Noa Konforty (Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Physics Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Oded Schiller (Electrical & Computer Eng. Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Maxwell J. Tolchin (Department of Materials Science Engineering, Pennsylvania State University, USA), Tony Yasniger (Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Physics Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Michael Birk (Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, The Norman Seiden Multidisciplinary Program in Nano-Science and Nano-Technology, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Alexander Palatnik (Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Physics Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Soham Saha (Argonne National Laboratory, Lemont, IL, USA), Pavel Sidorenko (Electrical & Computer Eng. Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Jon-Paul Maria (Department of Materials Science Engineering, Pennsylvania State University, USA), Yonatan Plotnik (Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Physics Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel), Mordechai Segev (Electrical & Computer Eng. Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Solid State Institute, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel, Physics Department, Technion-Israel Institute of Technology, Haifa, Israel)
时间反射发生在波传播于性质发生剧烈突变的介质中时：原波分裂为时间折射波和时间反射波，前者沿原路径继续传播但频率偏移，后者反向传播且相位反转并伴随频率偏移。尽管时间反射是波系统的基本现象，电磁波尤其是光学频率的时间反射此前仅在射频段观测到，因需要折射率在单周期内发生量级为1的变化，而常规光学非线性要么太弱要么太慢。本研究首次实现光学频率时间反射的观测，通过诱导亚周期持续时间的量级为1的折射率变化，成功观察到该效应。

item.title: 大西洋与太平洋翻转环流的多稳态：淡水强迫不对称性与水循环的作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Elian Vanderborght, Oliver Mehling, Henk A. Dijkstra
现代全球翻转环流的显著特征是大西洋存在深水形成而太平洋缺失，这种与北大西洋更高表面盐度相关的不对称性体现为北大西洋经向翻转环流（AMOC）及缺乏太平洋翻转环流（PMOC）。本文构建包含宽盆地与窄盆地的双盆地概念海洋模型，该模型允许三种状态：窄盆地单独下沉、宽盆地单独下沉及双盆地同时下沉。分析表明，弱水循环（类似温暖上新世气候）下双盆地均发生下沉，仅当一盆地蒸发足够强时才出现对称性破缺；中等水循环条件下，该工作围绕淡水不对称性与水循环强度对翻转环流多稳态的影响展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 时空解耦物理信息Stone-Weierstrass神经算子用于时变参数化偏微分方程的长时预测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shan Ding, Yongfu Tian, Lang Qin, Hongxiang Ma, Guofeng Su, Rui Yang
针对现有神经算子框架在长时预测时变偏微分方程时面临的精度退化、稳定性不足、训练成本高及内存消耗大等瓶颈，本文提出一种时空解耦的物理信息神经算子架构——物理信息Stone-Weierstrass神经算子（PI-SWNO）。该设计基于时间不变空间基函数与时间演变系数解耦的理论范式，结合Stone-Weierstrass定理的函数逼近能力，实现了高效稳定的长时间预测，为物理问题的深度学习求解提供了新途径。

item.title: 利用大语言模型大规模重构时序多关系企业网络：以半导体产业为例
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Seyda Köse, Christian Diem, Elma Dervic, Klaus Friesenbichler, Georg Heiler, Jan Hurt, Hernan Picatto, Peter Klimek
半导体产业是现代技术基础，但其复杂的全球多关系企业网络仍 poorly understood。本文提出结合大语言模型（LLMs）与开放网页数据的可推广方法学，从1.7亿个半导体企业网页中识别并分类供应链、合作伙伴及所有权链接，构建包含1300余家关联企业的时序网络。链接提取精度达0.884、F1分数0.784，经验证与专有数据库具有重叠性与互补性，且与宏观经济数据一致。网络分析揭示2022年芯片短缺期间边数暂时下降9%、AI供应链瓶颈企业（如NVIDIA）中心性快速上升，以及地缘背景下企业间关系的地理重新调整。

item.title: 弹跳或聚并：物理学习框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 J. H. Xu, Z. L. Wang
本研究开发基于物理准则与机器学习辅助分类的界面接触模拟框架，以统一形式描述聚并与弹跳现象。框架通过多体积分数（VOF）场的融合与生成实现界面聚并和弹跳：预测聚并时多个VOF场塌缩为单场，预测弹跳时单场再生为多个VOF场使界面独立演化。该策略将拓扑转变、regime图识别、计算需求增加及随机行为等难题从界面追踪中分离，交由物理引导的机器学习模型处理，避免了超薄气膜的直接解析并降低对经验分子力参数的依赖，液滴碰撞模拟验证了方法有效性。

item.title: 基于最小辅助基组的数据驱动完备基组极限估算
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nicolas Grimblat, Gabriel Klassen, Guido Falk von Rudorff
量子化学计算常用原子中心基组平衡精度与成本，但总能随基组尺寸增大向完备基组（CBS）极限缓慢收敛。常规外推方法需多个中等质量计算估算CBS能量。本文提出将成对相互作用模型与最小互补辅助基组（CABS）基线结合，通过核岭回归（KRR）从单一最小基组计算估算CBS能量，效率优于直接计算与Δ-机器学习。研究表明，利用切比雪夫多项式近似原子局域核可改进标准分子表示上的KRR，使模型能在中等计算资源上高效训练，实现物理基线捕捉主导效应与数据高效机器学习模型相结合的CBS数据驱动方法。

item.title: 里德伯原子中的多极黑体辐射频移
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 R. M. Potvliege
本文研究热辐射诱导里德伯态能量频移中的推迟效应，重点关注高于电偶极近似适用温度的情形。如Farley与Wing所预期，在特征温度αmc²/(3k_B n²)及以上需考虑推迟效应，其中n为主量子数，m为电子质量，k_B为玻尔兹曼常数；相应的非偶极频移在该特征温度约2.5倍处主导电偶极频移。研究还表明电四极热频移与抗磁热频移同量级，故在后者相关情形下需同时计入电四极贡献。

item.title: 利用PIConGPU对磁化低温氢靶激光驱动压缩与加热的动理学模拟
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Filip Optołowicz, Klaus Steiniger, David Blaschke, Michael Bussmann, Brian Marre
作者用PIConGPU进行了2D3V全动理学模拟，研究了三束直接驱动激光与15μm固态密度低温氢柱的相互作用，为HZDR的DRACO（30 fs）和PENELOPE（150 fs）装置提供数值基准。模拟揭示了约3 TV/m的电荷分离场，并发现加速离子分为快速束（1–5 MeV）和慢速主流（1–100 keV）的双峰结构。作者证明电荷分离前沿为本质上非准中性的静电双层，超出辐射流体力学模型的封闭假设，并提出2vₕb反射标度可在不同强度与脉宽下描述快离子能带行为。

item.title: 相对论磁重联中的Stern–Gerlach自旋分选
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 K. Nykyri
作者引入了一个用于磁重联的Stern–Gerlach自旋动理学控制参数Ξ，将扩散区穿越期间累积的SG横向位移与相对论Larmor半径之比作为分支参数。评估表明，SG输运在磁尾、日冕、AGN/blazar喷流、脉冲星风云中可忽略，但在磁星电流片及表面附近变为过渡到强相互作用区。电子—正电子PIC模拟显示SG力可按磁矩投影将粒子分选到Harris电流片两侧，而几乎不影响全局重联率，表明磁星是强场自旋动理学重联的天然候选靶。

item.title: 对数同伦粒子流滤波器的变分Lagrange框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Olivér Törő, Domonkos Csuzdi, Tamás Bécsi
针对对数同伦粒子流滤波器流速PDE的不定性，作者将粒子流视为无压无粘流体，构造基于动能的Lagrange作用量，并施加连续性方程与对数同伦演化约束。最小作用原理给出对应的Euler–Lagrange方程，得到无旋势流结构，并导出与Madelung量子流体表述同构的Hamilton–Jacobi方程，其中对数同伦约束起到广义量子势的作用，引导概率流体沿精确Bayes更新路径演化。

item.title: Njord：用于集合海洋预报的概率图神经网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel Holmberg, Joel Oskarsson, Erik Larsson, Fredrik Lindsten, Teemu Roos
作者提出Njord，一种结合深度潜变量框架与图神经网络的概率数据驱动海洋预报模型，每步预测可单次前向采样。通过K-means聚类网格适配不规则海面几何，模型可在全球0.25°和波罗的海2 km分辨率下运行。实验表明Njord在两种尺度上均优于确定性机器学习基线，并能提供不确定性估计；在OceanBench全球基准上，其上层海洋变量误差最低，尤其在海表温度预测上提升最大。

item.title: 双周期多层介质中Maxwell方程的基本解法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jared Weed, Bowei Wu, Jingfang Huang, Min Hyung Cho
作者发展了一种结合基本解方法与周期化方案的高精度数值方法，用于求解带准周期入射波的双周期多层介质时谐Maxwell方程。各层电磁场分解为近邻晶胞的近场相互作用和包围晶胞球面上代理源点表示的远场相互作用，结合界面切向连续性、晶胞壁准周期条件及Rayleigh–Bloch辐射条件，借助Schur补与稳定求解器求解。方法对单/多界面收敛至接近10⁻¹⁴，并示范了39界面问题。

item.title: 非厄米有向图网络中规范工程实现的可调模式选择
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wenwen Liu, Zhang Shuang
作者提出在有向图网络中通过规范工程实现几何保护的纯衰减模式（沿有向路径平滑指数衰减的本征态）。在全连接结构中自然出现具有大且可调能隙的主导模式；通过相位补偿非互易跳跃引入合成规范场，可将任意纯衰减模式提升为主导模式而保持其振幅分布。方法可推广至半连接图中的成对模式选择以及通过正交折叠在更高维度的多模式定制，为单模激光器、传感器和量子处理提供无需增益/损耗调控的鲁棒模式控制。

item.title: 量子特征放大网络（QFAN）作为自回归量子生成模型
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jamal Slim, Saverio Monaco, Florian Rehm, Dirk Kruecker, Kerstin Borras
为突破直接寄存器量子生成模型对寄存器规模的限制，作者提出QFAN：将图像按块序列生成，每块由同一小型参数化量子线路在已生成像素的压缩条件下产生，从而使量子比特需求只依赖于块大小而非整图。作者给出了散粒噪声沿生成链传播的保守上界以及可达序列深度的解码器容量启发式，并用三量子比特线路在量能器簇射模拟任务中演示该框架。

item.title: 基于Hong–Ou–Mandel干涉的多芯光纤亚皮秒芯间偏斜表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 L. Lira Tacca, L. Marques Fagundes, M. Morales Lillo, M. Navarro, I. Machuca, S. Gómez, G. H. dos Santos, J. Cariñe, G. Saavedra, E. S. Gómez, G. Lima, S. P. Walborn
作者利用光纤集成4×4多端口分束器中的双光子HOM干涉，对商用四芯光纤的芯间偏斜（ICS）进行高精度测量。通过提取全部12对芯组合的HOM干涉凹陷/峰中心位置，获得±0.11 ps精度的ICS值；在7.7 m到1300 m长度范围内ICS均方根遵循σ_τ(L)=κ√L+c规律（κ=48.7±2.5 ps/√km）。HOM对一阶路径涨落免疫，首次直接验证了从实验室到现场部署尺度的随机游走标度，精度相对经典方法提升约180倍。

item.title: LeanBET：在Lean中形式化验证的比表面积计算
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ejike D. Ugwuanyi, Colin T. Jones, John Velkey, Tyler R. Josephson
作者在Lean 4定理证明器中实现了完整可执行且形式化验证的BET比表面积分析流程，覆盖BETSI风格工作流的窗口枚举、单调性检验、拐点选择和线性回归。计算使用浮点算术，相应正确性证明在实数域上完成，并采用共享多态实现支持二者。作者证明回归系数与规范定义一致并最小化最小二乘误差，形式化了BET线性化表达式的代数推导，并证明窗口枚举的可靠性与完备性。

item.title: 用于求解偏微分方程的自监督神经算子
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wen You, Shaoqian Zhou, Xuhui Meng
作者提出自监督神经算子SNO，消除神经算子训练对昂贵高保真数值数据的依赖。SNO包含基于贝叶斯PINN的物理信息采样器在线生成训练数据、用于紧凑输入-输出表示的函数编码器，以及编码器型Transformer实现算子学习。在1D稳态/非稳态非线性反应-扩散方程、不同几何的2D非线性PDE和柔性圆柱涡激振动问题上验证了高精度，并显示轻量微调（约百级可训练参数）能进一步提升预测，指向预训练PDE基础模型的新路径。

item.title: 钝体尾流中湍流状态依赖控制的实时强化学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Junjie Zhang, Chengwei Xia, Xianyang Jiang, Isabella Fumarola, Georgios Rigas
作者提出REACT，一种用于风洞中钝体尾流湍流实时状态依赖控制的自主强化学习框架。在仅配备机载传感器和伺服驱动表面的Ahmed体模型上，REACT直接从稀疏实验测量中学习，无需经验湍流模型即可收敛到既减阻又实现净能量节省的策略。智能体自主发现动态抑制时空相干流动结构能最大化能效，性能比基于模型的基线高2–4倍，并展示出与准稳态、均流导向策略不同的动态感知特征。

item.title: NATPS：基于时间可逆MASH动力学的非绝热过渡路径采样
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiran Yang, Madlen Maria Reiner, Brigitta Bachmair, Leticia González, Johannes C. B. Dietschreit, Christoph Dellago
作者提出一种确定性且时间可逆的非绝热动力学实现，使过渡路径采样（TPS）可应用于激发态过程。该方法基于Mapping Approach to Surface Hopping（MASH），满足路径系综采样所需的时间可逆性与细致平衡条件，结合TPS形成NATPS新方法。在电子耦合势能面模型系统上，NATPS高效生成反应性轨迹系综并揭示非绝热路径机理，相比暴力轨迹模拟和前向通量采样显著降低计算成本。

item.title: 环面螺旋脉冲
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shuai Shi, Hongcheng Zhou, Junjie Shao, Pan Tang, Bing-Zhong Wang, Mu-Sheng Liang, Yanhe Lyu, Boris A. Malomed, Yijie Shen, Ren Wang
本文提出了一类环面螺旋电磁脉冲的理论框架并实现了实验验证，将螺旋性与传播型环面模式相结合。作者设计了同轴喇叭发射器与等角螺旋光栅组合的结构，直接产生具有非横向环面拓扑、时空不可分性以及可控螺旋度的单周期脉冲，为光-物质相互作用与数据传输等应用奠定基础。

item.title: 基于三重态对的量子传感理论研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Maria Grazia Concilio, Yiwen Wang, Siyuan Wang, Xueqian Kong
本文模拟了并五苯二聚体经分子内单重态裂变产生的自旋极化五重态流形作为分子量子传感器的性能。利用Lindblad主方程在自旋回波、XY4、XY8动力学解耦序列下进行仿真，结果显示二聚体与单体在单自旋探测中灵敏度相当，但二聚体架构在探测核自旋小集合时具有更优的相互作用截面。

item.title: 用于QCD轴子与暗光子探测的高激发电子回旋加速器
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xing Fan, Gerald Gabrielse, Peter W. Graham, Harikrishnan Ramani, Samuel S. Y. Wong, Yawen Xiao
本文提出利用囚禁电子的高激发回旋态探测meV量级轴子和暗光子暗物质。当轴子质量与回旋频率共振时跃迁概率正比于初始量子数n_c（约10⁶），并通过开放端盖阱设计兼容BREAD等大型聚焦腔，结合介电层的相干增强方案显著提升灵敏度。

item.title: 通过离壳希格斯产生进行希格斯三线性自耦合的神经仿真推断
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Aishik Ghosh, Maximilian Griese, Ulrich Haisch, Tae Hyoun Park
作者设计了一种混合神经仿真推断（NSBI）方法，从离壳希格斯过程构建包含SMEFT修正、背景与量子干涉效应的信号似然。该方法结合矩阵元增强训练与分类方法的优势，对HL-LHC给出接近理论最优的灵敏度估计，并对希格斯三线性自耦合及其他算符给出预期约束。

item.title: 利用数千GPU实现脉冲神经网络的可扩展构建
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Bruno Golosio, Gianmarco Tiddia, José Villamar, Luca Pontisso, Luca Sergi, Francesco Simula, Pooja Babu, Elena Pastorelli, Abigail Morrison, Markus Diesmann, Alessandro Lonardo, Pier Stanislao Paolucci, Johanna Senk
面向计算神经科学的大规模脉冲神经网络仿真，本文提出一种基于MPI的多GPU网络构建方法，各进程独立构建本地连接并准备高效脉冲交换的数据结构。在两个皮层模型上分别采用点对点与集合通信，展示了向百亿亿次超算扩展的性能。

item.title: 优化Penning阱中3D离子晶体量子传感的多普勒激光冷却方案
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 John Zaris, Wes Johnson, Athreya Shankar, John J. Bollinger, Allison L. Carter, Daniel H. E. Dubin, Scott E. Parker
本文开发了可模拟Penning阱中多达10⁵个离子的激光冷却数值框架，并应用于椭球形3D晶体。通过在E×B模式中加入轴向势能分量发现新的冷却路径，在长椭球晶体中将垂直动能冷却至1 mK以下，并给出最优阱与激光参数建议。

item.title: AgentStop：提前终止本地AI代理以节省消费级设备能耗
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dzung Pham, Kleomenis Katevas, Ali Shahin Shamsabadi, Hamed Haddadi
本文测量了消费级硬件上本地LLM代理的时间、token和能耗开销，发现代理式工作流显著增加GPU功耗、温度与电池消耗。作者提出轻量级监督器AgentStop，预测并提前终止不太可能成功的执行轨迹，以提升能效。

item.title: Mask-Morph图U-Net：面向大几何变化耐撞性场预测的可泛化网格代理模型
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haoran Li, Tobias Lehrer, Yingxue Zhao, Haosu Zhou, Philipp Stocker, Tobias Pfaff, Nan Li
本文提出MMGUNet，针对层次化Graph U-Net中边特定下/上采样层需固定连接性的限制，利用特征对齐重心参数化将粗化层级形变到每个输入网格以建立跨图边。结合节点掩码预训练，提高了对大几何变化下耐撞性场预测的泛化能力。

item.title: 分布式学习中数据归因的脆弱性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xian Gao, Bo Hui, Min-Te Sun, Wei-Shinn Ku
本文揭示分布式训练中数据归因机制存在脆弱性：单个参与者可通过潜在优化注入小批量合成数据，在不损害全局效用的情况下显著抬高自身归因值。该攻击在多种数据集、模型和评估器下均有效，且不会触发基于几何的防御，呼吁开发抗归因攻击的激励相容评分机制。

item.title: GOMA：从图信号平滑视角实现结构驱动的多模态对齐
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xu Wang, Xunkai Li, Yinlin Zhu, Rong-Hua Li, Guoren Wang
本文提出GOMA框架，将冻结的多模态嵌入视为多模态属性图上的图信号，通过解耦消息流向、传播方式与平滑机制，打破模态特定拓扑壁垒并控制过度平滑，从而在检索任务中精修视觉-语言嵌入。

item.title: 鞅神经算子：通过Doob-Meyer分解学习随机边缘分布
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kai Hidajat
针对神经算子在随机PDE中坍缩到条件均值的问题，本文基于Doob-Meyer定理将半鞅分解为可预测漂移与零均值鞅，提出鞅神经算子MNO，直接将初始条件映射到终态的条件均值与协方差。在1D SPDE、粗糙波动率与2D算子任务中，相比基线在Wasserstein距离上最高获得120倍的改进。

item.title: 基于变分量子分类器的SAFE量子机器学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ying Chen, Paolo Giudici, Vasily Kolesnikov, Paolo Recchia
本文提出在高维深度表示上使用幅值编码的变分量子分类器，并通过可学习的经典预编码层稳定。结合归一化幅值嵌入与有界量子观测，模型形成结构化平滑假设类，并采用基于Cramer-von Mises散度的SAFE-AI指标进行评估，结果显示其在准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性上比经典基线更平衡。

item.title: SNAC-Pack：面向FPGA部署的代理神经架构协同设计开源框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jason Weitz, Dmitri Demler, Benjamin Hawks, Aaron Wang, Nhan Tran, Javier Duarte
针对现有神经架构搜索仅优化精度或依赖与硬件成本相关性差的代理指标（如BOPs）的问题，作者提出开源AutoML框架SNAC-Pack，专注于硬件感知的神经架构协同设计与端到端FPGA部署。该框架利用Optuna和NSGA-II进行多目标全局搜索，结合共享SQLite数据库实现跨节点并行；并通过硬件代理模型预测各试验的资源与延迟，避免综合开销；本地搜索阶段联合量化感知训练与迭代幅度剪枝，最终通过hls4ml生成FPGA固件。

item.title: 基于Transformer的统一拉格朗日粒子动力学仿真
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Caoliwen Wang, Minghao Guo, Siyuan Chen, Heng Zhang, Mengdi Wang, Xingyu Ni, Hanson Sun, Kunyi Wang, Zherong Pan, Kui Wu, Lingjie Liu, Yin Yang, Chenfanfu Jiang, Taku Komura, Wojciech Matusik, Peter Yichen Chen
作者提出一种基于单一Transformer架构的学习型粒子仿真器，可统一建模布料、弹性体、牛顿与非牛顿流体、颗粒物质及分子动力学。模型采用预测-校正设计：显式预测器在外力下推进粒子，学习型校正器通过粒子分词器、超token编码器（交替自注意力与token合并）和超token解码器（交叉注意力）输出位置与速度的残差修正，实现高效统一仿真。

item.title: 用于地震图像分割的量子特征金字塔门控
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Taha Gharaibeh, Jyotsna Sharma
针对盐体勾画在地震解释中的重要性，作者提出量子特征门控分割架构，在编码器-解码器流水线的特征融合节点嵌入参数化量子电路（PQC）。采用4量子比特、2层带数据重上传的PQC在特征金字塔合并点计算横向与自顶向下特征的凸组合，并通过全局平均池化将编码器特征映射至4维量子输入，使72参数的量子预算与骨干规模和图像分辨率解耦。在2018年TGS盐体识别挑战数据集上进行了多种拓扑与电路设计的评估。
